title: Boost Engagement with Personalized Images: Introducing the imejis.io App
excerpt: We’re excited to announce the release of the imejis.io app, which lets you dynamically create images using data from your Monday board. You can also integrate it with other Monday.com apps to automate and schedule social…

posts.author: dharmik (Dharmik Jagodana)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to announce the release of the imejis.io app, which lets you dynamically create images using data from your Monday board. You can also integrate it with other Monday.com apps to automate and schedule social media posts effortlessly.

Plus, you can create personalized images for your emails, sending custom images every time to engage your audience more effectively.
